name: Orb of Yasaka
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>八尺勾玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヤサカノマガタマ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Equip only to a Spirit monster. When it destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard, gain Life Points equal to that monster's original ATK. When the equipped monster you control is returned to the hand and this card is sent to the Graveyard, return this card to your hand.
eff: Equip only to a Spirit monster. When it destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard, gain Life Points equal to that monster's original ATK. When the equipped monster you control is returned to the hand and this card is sent to the Graveyard, return this card to your hand.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
Activates if returned from the field to the hand
Returns itself from Graveyard to hand
misc: Equips only to a specific target
